_note: Hand-crafted illustrative payload. Real run via `bash smoke_test.sh` will overwrite this with the live shape from `git log` against the target repo. Stats are realistic but not measured.
author: mila@example.com

commits.subject: docs: trim langfuse readme to a secondary-skills table
commits.body: Pulled the long-form copy out of the README and replaced it with a one-row entry in the secondary-skills table so the marketplace stays scannable.

commits.subject: feat: add Langfuse skill to the marketplace as a curated recommendation
commits.body: Adds the Langfuse skill manifest and points at the upstream repo. Curated as a secondary recommendation so it doesn't compete with the in-house skills on the front page.

commits.subject: feat: add code review skill with staff-level simplification lens
commits.body: First pass at a code-review skill that prioritizes hot spots and leverage points over cosmetic cleanup. Produces a per-candidate disposition (simplify / encode / defer / leave).
